hero.title: All your storage infrastructure under a single intelligent platform
hero.subtitle: The dashboard to centralize your cold storage, manage hardware health, and ensure 100% regulatory compliance.

features.title: Everything you need to monitor and control
features.subtitle: IoT sensors, live dashboard, multichannel alerts, and regulatory reports - no manual spreadsheets, no lost thermometers, no surprises.

monitoring.title: Real-time IoT sensors monitoring
monitoring.body: Temperature, humidity, and door openings tracked live in cold rooms, warehouses, industrial kitchens, and minimarkets.

records.title: Download your complete history
records.body: Every reading is logged and exportable. Download historical data by asset, by site, or by period, in CSV or PDF format.

alerts.title: Notifications the moment something deviates
alerts.body: Email and messaging alerts when temperature or humidity goes out of range. The operations manager is notified instantly.

compliance.title: Reports for DIGESA and MINSA
compliance.body: Incident reports and logs exportable in one click. Ready-to-use templates for sanitary inspections for DIGESA and MINSA.

notes.history: Export your data history by asset, site, or period
notes.records: Download records by event type or sensor
notes.incidents: Download alert and incident logs instantly

time.label: Save time:
time.body: automate tasks and eliminate manual records.

risk.label: Reduce risks:
risk.body: act early and prevent incidents before they happen.

points.one: Live charts by asset, with configurable limits and automatic markers for every door opening.
points.two: Instant alerts for temperature or humidity excursions.

points.one: Alerts by email and message when a temperature or humidity excursion occurs.
points.two: Sent to the operations or quality manager, according to your configuration.
points.three: Real-time information to act quickly and avoid losses.

points.one: Complete historical records, each reading is stored by asset, site, or period.
points.two: Audit-ready reports, generate PDF or CSV reports aligned with DIGESA and MINSA.
points.three: Real-time information to act quickly and avoid losses.

points.one: All your sites, in one place, monitor the performance of each location in real time.
points.two: Compare and detect instantly, identify sites with alerts or low performance right away.
points.three: Prioritize interventions where they are most needed.

why.title: Why ColdTrace?
why.subtitle: Designed for operations and quality managers in minimarkets, cold rooms, warehouses, and industrial kitchens.

one.quote: ColdTrace helps us keep food fresh and avoid waste.
one.name: Daniel Reyes

two.quote: Now I can monitor our fridges from anywhere.
two.name: Laura Mendoza

three.quote: Now we prevent losses before they happen.
three.name: Andrés Silva

four.quote: ColdTrace ensures we meet all compliance standards.

pricing.title: Choose the plan that matches your cold-chain operation
pricing.subtitle: Compare Base, Operations, and Compliance AI with the same catalog used by the platform.

configure.title: Configure
configure.body: Assign sensors by cold room, define ranges and tolerances by product type, and choose responsible staff by shift. Everything is versioned.

monitor.title: Monitor
monitor.body: View by site, by zone, and by asset. Complete historical records, exportable in CSV or PDF. Alerts arrive before the product is damaged.

audit.title: Audit
audit.body: Every reading is recorded and available for download. Export the full report, ready for DIGESA, MINSA inspections or internal audits. Start right now!

terms.prefix: By creating your account, you agree to the

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: These Terms and Conditions govern the use of the ColdTrace platform and its associated landing page and web application. By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms. Please read them carefully.

s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
s1.body: By creating an account or using any part of the ColdTrace platform, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms and Conditions, as well as our data handling practices.

s2.title: 2. Description of Service
s2.body: ColdTrace provides a cold-chain monitoring platform that centralizes temperature, humidity, and door-opening data, delivers alerts, and generates audit-ready reports. The service is provided on an "as-is" and "as-available" basis.

s3.title: 3. User Responsibilities
s3.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account. You agree to use the platform only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms.

s4.title: 4. Data and Privacy
s4.body: We collect and process operational data solely to provide and improve the monitoring service. We are committed to handling your information responsibly and transparently, in line with applicable data-protection regulations.

s5.title: 5. Professional and Ethical Commitment
s5.body: ColdTrace is developed following the professional and ethical principles of the ACM/IEEE Software Engineering Code of Ethics and the Peruvian Colegio de Ingenieros del Peru (CIP). We strive to act in the public interest, deliver quality software, and maintain integrity and transparency throughout the product lifecycle.

s6.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
s6.body: ColdTrace shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of or inability to use the platform, to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law.

s7.title: 7. Changes to These Terms
s7.body: We may update these Terms and Conditions from time to time. Any material changes will be reflected on this page with an updated revision date. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

s8.title: 8. Contact
s8.body: For any questions regarding these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at support@coldtrace.com.
